# Opsfinitive

> Opsfinitive is a boutique, vendor-neutral, sovereign integration partner that makes AI agents production-safe in regulated, air-gapped critical operations. Its product, Plumbline, is a vendor-neutral agent governance layer for SOC and NOC environments. Delivered in the GCC and EU.

Opsfinitive makes AI agents production-safe in air-gapped SOC and NOC environments. The approach is engineering-first: models are used only where irreplaceable, cutting token cost by roughly 60–70% versus an LLM-first build. Legal entity: Opsfinitive Software Services FZC. Founder & GM: Davis Mathew Kuriakose.

## Capabilities
- Vendor-neutral AI agent governance (Plumbline): validate, gate, and audit any vendor's agent actions before they touch production systems.
- Agentic SOC: production-safe AI agents for security operations, beachhead via the Nomios channel.
- Autonomous / agentic NOC: AI-driven OSS/NMS operations for telecom and satcom networks.
- Sovereign & air-gapped operations: fully on-prem, no data egress, deployable in disconnected environments.
- Engineering-first agent design: re-engineer agents to reduce LLM/token cost by ~60–70%.
- Immutable audit trails, blast-radius limits, reversible actions, and observability/replay for every governed action.

## Verticals
- SOC / Security operations (beachhead)
- NOC / Telecom and Satcom (depth)
- Regulated critical infrastructure

## Geographies
- GCC (UAE and wider Gulf)
- European Union

## Products
- [Plumbline](https://opsfinitive.io/Plumbline.dc.html): Vendor-neutral governance layer that makes agentic operations production-safe and sovereign.

## Pages
- [Home](https://opsfinitive.io/): What Opsfinitive does, the operating model, and the outage sandbox demo.
- [Plumbline](https://opsfinitive.io/Plumbline.dc.html): The agent governance product — problem, product, method, and business case.
- [Blog](https://opsfinitive.io/Blog.dc.html): Perspectives and news on DevOps, agentic operations, and sovereignty.

- Email: info@opsfinitive.io
